note: Honest coverage frontier for the remediation lane (fails CLOSED). status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes; pending = specified behavior whose oracle is not bound yet (core/predict.PredictionGate + core/verify.Verifier are Phase 2; core/manifest exists but its REQ-102b oracle binding is deferred to the parent); retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior, INV-22). All scenarios are pending here — the parent binds the green ones.

scenarios.name: A prediction is committed before the approval poll starts
A proposal with no committed prediction is denied
An approval poll cannot be built without a gated prediction
Analysis-only mode records the prediction without gating the approval
The mechanical verdict is written only by the deterministic verifier
The acting model has no write path to the verdict columns
The verifier returns a typed verdict detail whose enum matches the bare verdict
The action_id is threaded unchanged through predict approve execute and verify
A mid-session action change mints a new action_id and forces a re-gate
The manifest action_id changes when any action field changes
A sealed manifest asserts its own action_id and rejects a foreign one
The sole ParseProposal entry point rejects every second grammar
